news-global-econ.title: Amazon AWS launches AI-powered office tools to challenge Microsoft and Salesforce
news-global-econ.description: Amazon AWS launches AI-powered office tools using AI agents, aiming to compete with Microsoft and Salesforce in the $300 billion business software market.

news-global-econ.title: Trevor Bauer says no MLB team will sign him despite throwing a no-hitter and offering to play for free
news-global-econ.description: Former Cy Young Award winner Trevor Bauer says nothing he does feels sufficient to earn an MLB return, despite a seven-inning no-hitter on Sunday.

news-global-econ.description:
As more and more people shop online, the ongoing wipeout of brick-and-mortar retail stores will continue.

news-global-econ.description:
Consumer confidence rose in April to the best level of the year, as consumers took a more optimistic view of the jobs market and their income prospects.

news-global-soc.title: USA Powerlifting settles trans athlete discrimination case but says Minnesota is 'out of step' with science
news-global-soc.description: USA Powerlifting reaches settlement with trans athlete JayCee Cooper but says it still strongly supports sex-based categories in strength sports.

news-global-soc.title: US condemns Iran’s leadership role at UN nuclear conference as ‘beyond shameful’
news-global-soc.description: The U.S. and allies condemned the U.N.'s decision to grant Iran a vice presidency at the Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty review conference in New York.

news-global-soc.title: Safe sex is about to get more expensive, world’s largest condom maker warns
news-global-soc.description: Condom prices could rise up to 30% as the Iran war disrupts supply chains, says Karex, the world's largest condom manufacturer based in Malaysia.

news-global-soc.title: Tech drags stocks lower as crude oil tops $110: Markets wrap
news-global-soc.description: Nasdaq 100 futures slipped 0.6%, with tech on the back foot after the Wall Street Journal reported that OpenAI recently failed to meet its goals for new users and sales
